summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Kalakar Entertainment OS app. All core functionality working correctly including guest login, OTP flow, navigation, and mobile-first responsive design.
passed_tests: Navigation to all screens via bottom nav works
Hash URL navigation works for all views (#stage, #network, #jobs, #profile, #messages, #notifications, #settings, #search, #saved)
Stage feed displays posts with images and content
Network view shows user cards with Connect buttons
Jobs view shows job listings with Apply buttons
Profile view shows user info correctly
Settings view shows menu options and Sign Out button
Search view has functional search input and trending searches
Saved view shows saved items with tabs
Mobile layout displays correctly at 375px width
Bottom navigation has proper touch targets (44px minimum)
Mock data displays correctly across all views
Toast notifications appear for login success
